status_counts_before_correction_reported.note: Prior cleanup-summary omitted two non-canonical STATUS values from arithmetic

entries_previously_omitted_from_status_c.resolution: Normalized pending → planned (unambiguous synonym for not-yet-executed verification with kind=pending scenarios).
Left as done. Not mapped to passed: entry has no executable pytest surface; mapping would invent a false green gate. Reported under unknown_or_other.

downgrades_passed_to_blocked.reason: Declared module-check pytest tests/test_video_decode.py is not green: environment selects PyAV while two tests expect OpenCV.
Declared module-check tests/test_detection_metrics.py is not green: three TestPyAVMetrics cases fail on missing stream.codec_context in fake test double; no separate green targeted evidence.

module_vs_entry_coverage.fix: build_coverage_map.py now uses module_to_vm: dict[str, list[str]] and reports levels.module vs levels.verification_entry

phase_test_pre_existing_failures.pre_existing_failure_basis: Recorded in phase-tests.txt at HEAD 34250e7 prior to this correction; product runtime and tests unchanged

fix_1_module_vs_entry_coverage.summary: build_coverage_map.py uses module_to_vm: dict[str, list[str]]; reports section A module metrics (120) and section B entry metrics (144). Entry-level empty wave = 47; module-level all-entries-empty wave = 35. No V-M entries lost by aggregation.

fix_2_status_arithmetic.summary: All 144 STATUS values collected; unknown_or_other category added; hard assert sum == 144. Previously omitted: pending (V-M-REF-CLEAN-WINDOWS → planned) and done (V-M-PERF-DETECT-BOTTLENECK left as done / unknown_or_other).

fix_3_vm_video_decode.summary: V-M-VIDEO-DECODE passed → blocked with environment-dependent backend-selection blocked-reason. Module-check retained as failing evidence surface. No runtime/test fix.

fix_4_passed_failing_audit.summary: Audited passed entries against failed test files. Downgraded V-M-VIDEO-DECODE and V-M-PERF-DETECT-BASELINE. V-M-BACKENDS is in_progress; V-M-BACKEND-PYAV and V-M-DETECT-METRICS already blocked. No remaining passed/failing contradictions.

fix_5_failure_groups.summary: Seven phase failures split into 3 STALE_PYAV_CODEC_CONTEXT_TEST_DOUBLE (F-0103_CONTEXT_ONLY) + 4 ENVIRONMENT_DEPENDENT_BACKEND_SELECTION_EXPECTATION. Not all classified as F-0103.

fix_6_correction_consistency.summary: run_correction_consistency_checks.py implements checks A–G plus H (pytest must not target src/**/*.py) and I (V-M-PERF-DETECT-BASELINE invariants).

final_localized_correction.what_was_wrong: V-M-PERF-DETECT-BASELINE had STATUS=blocked while notes still claimed passed status. Module-checks also ran pytest against production src/*.py files.
final_localized_correction.what_was_fixed: Notes aligned with blocked status. Invalid pytest src targets removed. Only real test modules retained. Analogous invalid src pytest targets removed from V-M-PERF-DETECT-TWO-PASS.
final_localized_correction.how_verified: Consistency check confirms zero pytest module-checks on src/*.py, blocked status preserved, and notes do not claim passed verification status.
final_localized_correction.practical_effect: Next agent will not treat the completed management milestone as a green current verification entry and will not run pytest against production files.

other_entries_changed_for_same_defect_on.change: Removed pytest module-checks targeting production src/*.py; kept tests/test_twopass_parity.py and tests/test_detect_slides.py.
